title: Darth Nihilus — Lord of Hunger
chunkText: Darth Nihilus is one of the Sith Triumvirate antagonists in KOTOR 2. A survivor of Malachor V, Nihilus became a wound in the Force — a being that consumes Force energy from living things, stripping planets of all life. He exists as a mask and robes containing little more than an insatiable hunger. Nihilus destroyed the Miraluka colony on Katarr. His weakness is that the Exile, also a wound in the Force, partially resists his drain.
